sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23917" key="dekatw/nhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεκᾰτ-ώνης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n23917.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tithe-farmer,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0406.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
